pending.body: In `select_next_milestone_bead_from_recommendation` (src/cli/run.rs:676-679), the controller transition reason says 'requesting the next bead recommendation from bv before any claim' even though this function receives a pre-fetched recommendation and never calls bv. The `Selecting` state reason should reflect reality, e.g. 'validating a pre-fetched bv recommendation against br readiness before any claim'. This matters because operators inspect controller state reasons for debugging.

In `persist_next_step_recommendation` (src/cli/run.rs:354-385), all error paths use `eprintln!` for logging. In a daemon context, stderr may not be monitored. Consider using `tracing::warn!` (already used elsewhere in the codebase, e.g. success_reconciliation.rs:267) for consistency, so these failures appear in structured logs alongside the tracing infrastructure the daemon already uses.
